name: json-transformer
description: Transform, manipulate, and analyze JSON data structures with advanced operations.
capabilities: Parse and validate JSON from strings, files, and APIs
Transform nested objects and arrays with flattening and unflattening
Extract data using JSONPath and JMESPath queries
Convert JSON to CSV, YAML, and XML formats
Merge and combine JSON documents with deep merging
Generate JSON schemas from data structures
author: CuriousLearner
securitySummary: Pure documentation skill containing only markdown guidance for JSON transformation. Static findings are false positives - scanner misidentified JSON serialization (json.dumps) as cryptographic algorithms, markdown code formatting backticks as shell execution, and config validation placeholders as credential access. No executable code, network access, or file system operations exist in this skill.
valueStatement: JSON data often comes in complex nested structures that are hard to work with. This skill provides expert guidance for parsing, transforming, validating, and converting JSON for any use case.
limitations: Skill provides guidance only, does not execute transformations itself
Does not validate external JSON schemas or API contracts
Cannot access local files without explicit user request

useCases.title: API Response Transformation
useCases.description: Transform complex API responses into clean application-ready formats

useCases.title: Data Pipeline Conversion
useCases.description: Convert between JSON and other formats for data pipeline workflows

useCases.title: Config File Management
useCases.description: Merge and validate configuration files across environments

promptTemplates.title: Parse and Format
promptTemplates.prompt: Parse and pretty-print this JSON data, then identify any formatting issues and suggest fixes.

promptTemplates.title: Extract Data
promptTemplates.prompt: Extract all email addresses from users over age 25 using JSONPath syntax from this data structure.

promptTemplates.title: Convert Format
promptTemplates.prompt: Convert this JSON array to CSV format with proper headers for spreadsheet import.

promptTemplates.title: Merge Configs
promptTemplates.prompt: Deep merge these two configuration files, showing me where values were overridden.

bestPractices: Always validate JSON structure before performing transformations
Use JSONPath or JMESPath for complex data extraction queries
Test transformations on sample data before applying to production
antiPatterns: Manually editing deeply nested JSON instead of using transformation functions
Skipping validation when merging configuration files
Converting large JSON files to CSV without flattening nested structures first

faq.question: What tools support JSON transformation?
faq.answer: Python json module, jq CLI, jmespath, and jsonpath-ng are common tools for JSON operations.

faq.question: What are size limits for JSON processing?
faq.answer: Processing limits depend on available memory. Use streaming parsers for files over 100MB.

faq.question: How do I integrate with existing code?
faq.answer: Use language-specific libraries like Python's json module or Node's JSON.stringify for transformations.

faq.question: Is my data safe during transformations?
faq.answer: Transformations run locally in memory. No data is sent to external services without explicit request.

faq.question: Why is my JSON not parsing correctly?
faq.answer: Check for trailing commas, unescaped quotes, and wrong encoding. Use a JSON validator tool.

faq.question: How is this different from jq?
faq.answer: This skill provides AI guidance while jq is a command-line tool. They work well together.
